entry.title: TouchNet TEST site - Scheduled Maintenance June 26, 2026 - 05:00 a.m. to June 26, 2026 - 05:00 p.m.
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 26, 05:00 - 17:00 PDT

May 26, 12:12 PDT
Scheduled - The TouchNet TEST site will be undergoing scheduled maintenance. During the update window the TouchNet TEST site will be offline for logging in by staff as a TouchNet user and for making TEST payments.
For any questions please contact dpp.support@ubc.ca

entry.title: TouchNet PROD site - Scheduled Maintenance June 12, 2026 - 12:00 a.m. to June 12, 2026 - 04:00 a.m.
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 12, 00:00 - 04:00 PDT

May 26, 12:10 PDT
Scheduled - The TouchNet PROD site will be undergoing scheduled maintenance. During the update window the TouchNet PROD site will be offline for logging in by staff as a TouchNet user and for customers making new payments. During this time when the payor clicks "pay now" TouchNet will display a screen informing the payor that the system is off line for maintenance and to try again after the system is back online.
For any questions please contact dpp.support@ubc.ca

entry.title: Admissions System Maintenance (ADM) Maintenance June 9, 2026, 15:00-18:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 9, 15:00 - 18:00 PDT

May 19, 11:57 PDT
Scheduled - ADM applications, including Admissions Administrative Portal (AAP), Applicant Service Centre (ASC), Broad-Based Admission (BBA), and Application Server (AS), will be unavailable on June 9, 2026, from 15:00 to 18:00 PT due to a planned server migration.
During this time, staff may not be able to access ADM applications, and students may not be able to log in to the Applicant Service Centre to accept offers, view application statuses, or complete related activities. Students, faculty, and staff are advised to plan accordingly.

entry.title: Perceptive Content and Document Viewer Maintenance June 8, 2026, 08:30–13:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 8, 08:30 - 13:00 PDT

May 19, 11:55 PDT
Scheduled - Perceptive Content or ImageNow, and Document Viewer will be unavailable on June 8, 2026, from 08:30 to 13:00 PT due to a planned server migration. During this time, users will not be able to access Perceptive Content or view documents, including transcripts, through the Document Viewer application in Workday. Admissions staff and other users are advised to plan accordingly.

entry.title: TouchNet TEST site - Scheduled Maintenance June 05, 2026 - 05:00 a.m. to June 05, 2026 - 05:00 p.m.
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 5, 05:00 - 17:00 PDT

May 26, 12:07 PDT
Scheduled - The TouchNet TEST site will be undergoing scheduled maintenance. During the update window the TouchNet TEST site will be offline for logging in by staff as a TouchNet user and for making TEST payments.
For any questions please contact dpp.support@ubc.ca

entry.title: UBC SharePoint Maintenance Wednesday, June 3, 2026 17:00 PT to 22:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 3, 17:00 - 22:00 PDT

May 28, 15:50 PDT
Scheduled - On Wednesday, June 3, 2026 from 17:00 PT to 22:00 PT, the UBC SharePoint Software as a Service (SaaS) service will be undergoing maintenance. During this maintenance window, SharePoint sites will not be accessible. If you require access to any files, please download a local copy prior to the maintenance window.

entry.title: Scientia Enterprise Suite Scheduled Maintenance June 2, 2026, 4:30PM PT - June 3, 2026 4:00PM PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 2, 16:30 PDT  -  Jun 3, 16:00 PDT

May 25, 16:08 PDT
Scheduled - The Scientia Enterprise Suite, including the web portal, will be undergoing scheduled maintenance on June 2, 2026, 4:30PM PT - June 3, 2026 4:00PM PT
In this regard, the service may not be available within this period.

Please contact SIS.Support@ubc.ca for any questions or concerns.

entry.title: University Computer Management System (UCMS) Maintenance May 30, 2026, 00:00-11:00 PT
entry.content:
May 30, 11:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 30, 00:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 25, 16:06 PDT
Scheduled - University Computer Management System (UCMS) Maintenance for Apple devices (Jamf Pro) will be undergoing routine maintenance on May 30, 2026, 00:00-11:00 PT. During this time Apple devices will not be able to contact the server for updates, however no disruption to the use of Apple devices is expected.

entry.title: Workday Scheduled Weekly Maintenance May 29, 2026, 21:00 PT to May 30, 2026, 00:00 PT
entry.content:
May 30, 00:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 29, 21:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 25, 10:42 PDT
Scheduled - Please be advised that on May 29 2026, 21:00 PT to May 30 2026, 00:00 PT, Workday will be undergoing scheduled maintenance as part of its weekly service update. The system will remain accessible during the scheduled maintenance period but it is advised not to run critical processes and tasks.
Learn about Workday Support at UBC and other available resources on isc.ubc.ca.

entry.title: Official Document Tool (ODMT) Maintenance May 29, 2026 15.00 - 20.00 PT
entry.content:
May 29, 20:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 29, 15:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 29, 08:08 PDT
Scheduled - The UBC Official Document Tool (ODMT) will be temporarily unavailable due to scheduled maintenance on May 29, 2026, from 3:00 PM to 8:00 PM (PT). The outage may extend into the morning of Monday, June 1. During this maintenance window, students will not be able to access, download, or order official documents (e.g., transcripts, enrolment letters, program completion letters).

entry.title: Multiple Learning Technology Services Unavailable - May 29, 2026, 17:30 PT
entry.content:
May 29, 18:18 PDT
Monitoring - As of 18:10, all Learning Technology services have been restored.
LTIC technicians continue to monitor the situation closely.

May 29, 17:40 PDT
Investigating - As of 17:30 PT on May 29, 2026, UBC Moodle, iPeer, ComPAIR, Wiki, Exam Card Scanner, and LTPS User Interface are all unavailable.

UBC LTIC technicians have been contacted and are investigating the issue.

Another update will be provided by 19:00 PT.

entry.title: Microsoft Copilot users experiencing intermittent slowness May 29, 2026 10.00 PT
entry.content:
May 29, 10:11 PDT
Investigating - Microsoft Copilot users may be experiencing intermittent slowness or non-response from Copilot.  Microsoft is aware of the issue and is actively working to recover the service.  
Next update will be provided at 12:00 PT.

entry.title: Enterprise Automation & Solution Delivery APPIAN Cloud Platform Maintenance from May 28, 2026, 20:00 - 22:00 PST
entry.content:
May 28, 22:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 28, 20:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 27, 15:43 PDT
Scheduled - Enterprise Automation & Solution Delivery (EASD) APPIAN Business Process Management System (BPMS) Cloud Platform Maintenance from May 28, 2026, 20:00 PT to 22:00 PST

During the maintenance window, the Appian Production site will have a service interruption of up to 2 hours between May 28, 2026, 20:00 and 22:00 PST

Validation will continue until 16:00 PST, next day - May 29, 2026 16:00 PST

All BPMS Applications will auto-recover.

Impacted applications:

Scheduling Applications:
Special Topics and Variable Credit (STVC)
Standard Time Table (STTM)
Scheduling Menu (SM)
Final Grade Submission (AOC)
Official Documents (ODMT)
Student Direct Stream (SDS)
Document Viewer (DOCV)
Learner Financial Support (LFS)
Role Based Access Control (RBAC)
Student Communications Tool (ADHC)
Course Management (CRSS)
Academic Records (AARS)
Affiliate Student Management Tool (ASMT)
Scheduling Transfers (SCHT)
Custom Organization Management System (COMS)
Exam Management (EXMM)
Integration Error Log (ERRL)
Record Queue Manager (RQM)
TeachEval (SET)
Graduation Management (CNVM)

entry.title: Perceptive Content Maintenance Outage: May 28, 2026 (17:00–17:45 PT)
entry.content:
May 28, 17:45 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 28, 17:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 19, 14:43 PDT
Scheduled - A scheduled maintenance activity will be performed on the Perceptive Content environment.

The RHEL server will be patched as scheduled, and all Perceptive Content application services will be unavailable during the maintenance window.

entry.title: Enterprise Automation and Solution Delivery services maintenance for Exam Management from May 28, 2026 15:00 -17:00
entry.content:
May 28, 17:01 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 28, 15:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 27, 15:46 PDT
Scheduled - Enterprise Automation and Solution Delivery services maintenance for Exam Management from May 28, 2026 15:00 -17:00

The EASD Team will be releasing software updates that may affect Exam services

During this maintenance window there may be a brief interruption to the apps and services for <30 min
Release activities will be completed between from May 28, 2026 15:00 - 17:00.
Apps/Services:

Bug fixes / Enhancement for Exam Application and Exam Requirement
Fix Appian to capture the correct number of registered students, including registration drops and adds with minimal delay so that when Scheduling Services exports the exam requirements from Appian to Scientia Exam Scheduler, there is accurate student information being transferred.
A fix to remove 500 error frpm Appian application when exam payments are processed by upay/dpp
Impacts:

No other impacts to end users.
Reason for maintenance:

IRP Student: Exams enhancements & bug fixes

entry.title: UBCIT eSAM Servers Maintenance May 27, 2026, 20:00-23:00 PT
entry.content:
May 27, 23:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 27, 20:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 5, 12:12 PDT
Scheduled - UBCIT will be performing maintenance on the eSAM component and vault servers on May 27, 2026, 20:00-23:00 PT. This change will affect both UBC campuses.

Users will intermittently not be able to login to any servers managed by eSAM, nor retrieve any credentials via the eSAM Web UI throughout the maintenance window.

Any connections terminated while a component is being rebooted can be reconnected to the secondary node. All connections will be terminated and users won't be able to reconnect while we patch the vault servers (which typically lasts around 30 minutes) during this window.

entry.title: UBC IT Domain Name System DNS Maintenance May 27, 2026, 17:00-21:00 PT
entry.content:
May 27, 21:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 27, 17:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 26, 14:57 PDT
Scheduled - UBC IT will be performing maintenance on its DNS servers on May 27, 2026, 17:00-21:00 PT.
DNS/DHCP service will not be impacted.

entry.title: Cybersecurity Confidential Communications Website Upgrade May 27, 2025, 17:00-19:00 PT
entry.content:
May 27, 19:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 27, 17:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 27, 12:55 PDT
Scheduled - The Cybersecurity Confidential Communications website cc.cybersecurity.ubc.ca will be undergoing scheduled maintenance on May 27, 2025, 17:00-19:00 PT. During this time, users will not be able to access this site.

entry.content:
May 27, 18:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 27, 14:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 26, 14:54 PDT
Update - We will be undergoing scheduled maintenance during this time.

May 26, 14:52 PDT
Scheduled - EduCloud Server Web Portals (bcnet.educloud.ubc.ca, dr.educloud.ubc.ca, and educloud.ubc.ca) will undergo maintenance on May 27, 2026, 14:00–18:00 PT. There is no expected user impact during this maintenance window.

entry.title: FireMon Maintenance, May 27, 2026, 0930 - 1330 PT
entry.content:
May 27, 13:30 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 27, 09:30 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 26, 14:50 PDT
Scheduled - FireMon will be undergoing maintenance, May 27, 2026, 0930 - 1330 PT. During this time, there may be intermittent periods of disruption or brief service interruptions as systems are transitioned.

entry.title: Black screen on UBC-managed Windows devices
entry.content:
May 27, 12:06 PDT
Resolved - This incident has been resolved.

May 25, 12:30 PDT
Update - Some faculty and staff Windows workstations are experiencing an issue where users see a black screen and the Windows taskbar disappeared and applications could not be launched.

The issue has been identified. Impacted systems must remain connected to the internet to receive the update.

A reboot is not required.

Users currently experiencing the issue can restore functionality by restarting Windows Explorer with the following steps:

1. Press Ctrl + Shift + Esc to open Task Manager.
2. If Task Manager opens in compact mode, select More details. Select Run new task.
3. Type explorer.exe and select OK.
4. The update may take up to one hour to complete.
5. If the issue still persists after this, please reach out to your local IT desktop support team.

If you are unable to connect to the network for this update, please reach out to your local IT desktop support team.

May 25, 12:30 PDT
Monitoring - .

entry.title: UBC Identity Provider Maintenance May 24, 2026 19:10 to 20:10 PT
entry.content:
May 25, 10:45 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 25, 09:45 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 25, 09:44 PDT
Scheduled - The UBC Identity Provider (authentication.ubc.ca) will be undergoing system maintenance. On Sunday, May 24, 2026 19:10 to 20:10 PT, there will be a short 1 minute outage, with normal operation following. We apologize for any inconvenience caused.

entry.title: Clockwork Application May 25, 2026 08.25 PT
entry.content:
May 25, 09:39 PDT
Resolved - This incident has been resolved.

May 25, 08:25 PDT
Investigating - There are reports of access issues for some users with the Clockwork application. The support teams are investigating but no ETA at this time.
Please contact sis.support@ubc.ca for any questions and concerns.

entry.title: Intermittent CWL Authentication issues affecting access to some UBC systems May 25, 2026 08.00 PT
entry.content:
May 25, 09:16 PDT
Resolved - This incident has been resolved.

May 25, 08:07 PDT
Investigating - Some users may be experiencing intermittent issues with CWL. IT teams are currently investigating this issue.

We appreciate your patience. Please get in touch with the IT Service Centre in case you are experiencing CWL login challenges.
